title: Merge & Rebase
description: Menggabungkan branch menggunakan merge atau rebase.

commands.name: git merge
commands.title: Menggabungkan Branch
commands.description: Menggabungkan perubahan dari branch lain ke branch saat ini.

options.description: Hanya fast-forward, gagal jika tidak bisa

commands.examples:
# Merge feature ke main
git switch main
git merge feature/login

# Merge tanpa fast-forward
git merge --no-ff feature/login

# Squash merge
git merge --squash feature/small-fix
git commit -m "squash: small fixes"

# Resolve conflict
# 1. Edit file konflik
# 2. git add .
# 3. git merge --continue
commands.notes: --no-ff direkomendasikan agar history branch tetap terlihat.

commands.name: git rebase
commands.title: Rebase Branch
commands.description: Memindahkan basis branch ke commit terbaru branch target — history lebih linear.
commands.examples:
# Rebase feature ke main terbaru
git switch feature/login
git rebase main

# Interactive rebase (edit history)
git rebase -i HEAD~5
# Di editor: pick, squash, fixup, reword, drop

# Rebase --onto
git rebase --onto main server client
commands.warning: JANGAN rebase commit yang sudah di-push ke remote bersama! Bisa merusak history orang lain.

commands.name: Resolve Conflict
commands.title: Menyelesaikan Konflik
commands.description: Cara menyelesaikan konflik saat merge atau rebase.
commands.syntax:
# Edit file yang konflik
# Hapus marker <<<<<<< ======= >>>>>>>
git add <file>
git merge --continue  # atau git rebase --continue
commands.examples:
# Saat merge conflict:
git merge feature
# CONFLICT in file.txt
# Edit file.txt — hapus conflict markers
git add file.txt
git merge --continue

# Auto resolve
git checkout --ours file.txt    # ambil versi kita
git checkout --theirs file.txt  # ambil versi mereka
git add file.txt

# Batalkan
git merge --abort
commands.notes: Conflict markers: <<<<<<< HEAD (milik kita), ======= (pemisah), >>>>>>> branch (milik mereka).
